items.name: Axe
items.rules: An axe has an extra save modifier of -1

items.name: Ball and Chain
items.rules: No armour saves are allowed, causes 1D3 wounds instead of 1 The first turn, moves 2D6". In his subsequent Movement phases, roll a D6 to determine what the model does A model equipped with one may carry no other weapons or equipment, requires Mad Cap Mushrooms. Must roll for Injury after battle as if taken out of action.

items.name: Barbed Whip
items.rules: When the wielder charges, they gain +1 Attack for that turn. When charged, they gain +1 Attack against the charger which strikes first. A model attacked by a barbed whip may not parry. As long as he is not involved in close combat all Warhounds of Chaos within 4" gain +1 attack.

items.name: Beastlash
items.rules: Animals charging or being charged by the wielder must pass a Fear test. A model attacked by a barbed whip may not parry. When the wielder charges, they gain +1 Attack for that turn. When charged, they gain +1 Attack against the charger which strikes first.

items.name: Bec de Corbin
items.rules: It requires two hands to use. The model armed with Bec de Corbin strikes in initiative order when charged instead of going last. When rolling for Injuries, 2-4 is treated as stunned when rolling on the Injury chart. Dwarfs are immune to this effect.

items.name: Boat Hook
items.rules: The Boat Hook Strike First in Close Combat Models using a Boat Hook in combat cannot use any other weapons

items.name: Boss Pole
items.rules: Strikes first when charged Cannot use second weapon +1 Strength when charging mounted Allows nearby Goblins to ignore Animosity

items.name: Brass Knuckles
items.rules: Grants extra Attack when used in pairs -2 Initiative in close combat

items.name: Brazier Iron
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield Chance to set target on fire

items.name: Broadsword
items.rules: Cannot use second weapon or buckler Always strikes last

items.name: Cat O' Nine Tails
items.rules: Attacks cannot be parried Enemy gets +1 to armour save +1A when charging or being charged

items.name: Cathayan Longsword
items.rules: +1 Initiative and +1 Weapon Skill An axe has an extra save modifier of -1

items.name: Censer
items.rules: +2 Strength only first turn Requires two hands to wield Toughness test for extra wound

items.name: Chain Sticks
items.rules: +2 Attacks first turn of combat Requires two hands to wield

items.name: Claw of the Old Ones
items.rules: Target gets no armour save Can parry enemy blows

items.name: Cleaver
items.rules: Target gets -1 to armour save

items.name: Club, Mace or Hammer
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Club
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Mace
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Hammer
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Dagger
items.rules: Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Dark Elf Blade
items.rules: +1 to critical hit results 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Disease Dagger
items.rules: Target gets +1 to armour save Chance to cause disease on hit

items.name: Double-handed weapon
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield Always strikes last in combat

items.name: Dragon Sword
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield Can parry attacks

items.name: Dwarf Axe
items.rules: Extra -1 armour save modifier Can parry attacks

items.name: Fighting Claws
items.rules: Grants extra Attack when used in pairs +1 Initiative when climbing Can parry and re-roll failed parries Cannot use other weapons

items.name: Fist
items.rules: Only applies to warriors who have lost their weapons. Warriors using their fists can only ever make 1 attack. Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Flail
items.rules: +2 Strength only first turn Requires two hands to wield

items.name: Great Axe
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield Always strikes last unless has Strongman Extra -1 armour save modifier

items.name: Gromril Weapon
items.rules: A gromril weapon has an extra -1 save modifier

items.name: Halberd
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield

items.name: Hobgoblin Poisoned Daggers
items.rules: Grants extra Attack when used in pairs +1 Initiative for combat order Permanently coated in Black Lotus Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Horseman's Hammer
items.rules: Requires two hands to wield +1 Strength when charging mounted

items.name: Iron Fist
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Cannot hold other weapons in same hand Functions as both buckler and weapon

items.name: Ithilmar Weapon
items.rules: An ithilmar weapon gives its user +1 Initiative in hand-to-hand combat

items.name: Katar
items.rules: Target gets -1 to armour save

items.name: Kitchen Knife
items.rules: Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Ladle
items.rules: Only shields provide saves On hit roll of 6, enemy drops weapon

items.name: Lance
items.strength: As user +2 when charging on horseback
items.rules: Requires warhorse to use +2 Strength when charging mounted

items.name: Main Gauche
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Man-catcher
items.rules: Captures instead of killing Requires two hands to wield

items.name: Misericordia
items.rules: Target gets +1 to armour save When attacking enemies that are Knocked-Down you get to roll 2D6 and pick the highest number on ‘to wound’ roll.

items.name: Morning Star
items.rules: +1 Strength only first turn Cannot use second weapon or buckler

items.name: Obsidian Weapon
items.rules: Cannot be used by certain factions Always strikes last

items.name: Ogre Club
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned -1 to enemy armour saves

items.name: Pike
items.rules: Strikes first when charged Can attack from 3" away Cannot use shields or bucklers Only man-sized or larger can use

items.name: Pike
items.rules: Strikes first with +1 Initiative Requires two hands to use

items.name: Poison Daggers
items.rules: Grants extra Attack when used in pairs Coated in Death Cap Mushroom juice Target gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Quarter Staff
items.rules: +1 Initiative in close combat Can parry enemy blows Can be used with bare hands

items.name: Rapier
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Can make additional attacks on failed wounds Enemy gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Serpent Staff
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows, or can make one WS4, S4 attack that strikes first.

items.name: Shortsword
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Enemy gets +1 to armour save

items.name: Sigmarite Warhammer
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned +1 to wound vs Possessed/Undead

items.name: Sons of Hashut Obsidian Weapon
items.rules: Only swords, axes, and hammers can be obsidian -1 Initiative in melee

items.name: Spear
items.rules: Strikes first when charged Cannot use second weapon +1 Strength when charging mounted

items.name: Spiked Gauntlet
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows

items.name: Starblade
items.rules: Enemy gets +1 to armour save Can parry first hit on 4+

items.name: Starsword
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Target gets no armour save

items.name: Steel Whip
items.rules: Attacks cannot be parried +1A when charging or charged

items.name: Sword
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows

items.name: Sword Breaker
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Chance to break opponent's weapon

items.name: Tenderiser
items.rules: 2-4 on injury table is Stunned

items.name: Trident
items.rules: Can parry enemy blows Strikes first when charged

items.name: Weeping Blades
items.rules: Grants extra Attack when used in pairs Permanently coated in black lotus Can parry enemy blows

items.name: Plague Censer
items.rules: +2 Strength. All models within 3" (friend and foe) suffer S1 hit at start of each combat phase. Two-handed. Bearer takes D6 S1 hits per turn unless has Censer Bearer skill.

items.name: Blunderbuss
items.rules: Automatically hits all models in a 16" x 1" line. May only be fired once per battle.

items.name: Chaos Dwarf Blunderbuss
items.rules: Automatically hits all models in a 16" x 1" line. May fire more than once; takes a full turn to reload ❓ .

items.name: Double-barrelled Duelling Pistol
items.rules: +1 bonus to hit for all shots and close combat attacks Takes a complete turn to reload ❓ , can fire every other turn (every turn with brace) -2 armour save modifier Can be used in close combat for +1 Attack at S4 with -2 save modifier Can fire one or both barrels with different effects

items.name: Double-barrelled Handgun
items.rules: Fires every other turn. Cannot move and fire, except to pivot or stand up. -2 armour save modifier. Can fire one or both barrels; takes two turns to reload both.

items.name: Double-barrelled Pistol
items.rules: May only fire every other turn unless wielding a brace. Inflicts -2 modifier to armour saves. Can be used in melee to grant +1 Attack at S4, -2 save mod. May fire one or both barrels; both barrels require special reloading with tokens.

items.name: Duelling Pistol
items.rules: +1 to hit with both shooting and close combat attacks. Fires every other turn; with a brace, may fire every turn. -2 armour save modifier. Grants bonus attacks in close combat using pistol stats.

items.name: Hand-held Mortar
items.rules: May only fire every other turn due to reloading. Cannot move and fire in the same turn, except pivot or stand up. Armour saves suffer a -2 modifier when wounded. Missed shots land 2D6" in a random direction. Subject to optional Blackpowder Weapons rules; non-BOOM results jam the weapon. Target and all models within 1½” take a S4 hit.

items.name: Handgun
items.rules: May only fire every other turn due to reloading. Cannot move and fire in the same turn, except pivot or stand up. Armour saves suffer a -2 modifier when wounded.

items.name: Hersten-Wenkler Pigeon Bombs
items.rules: Cannot move and fire in the same turn, except pivot or stand up. As per the Hand-held Mortar's Explosive Radius rule. Roll a D6: 5-6 hits, 2-4 fizzles, 1 explodes in the user's hands. Once purchased, the Hero has enough for the whole campaign.

items.name: Hunting Rifle
items.rules: Cannot move and fire in the same turn, except to pivot or stand up. Can only fire every other turn due to reloading. Can target any visible enemy, not just the closest. Wounded targets suffer a -2 armour save modifier.

items.name: Ostlander Double-barrelled Hunting Rifle
items.rules: A double-barrelled gun (of any sort) is treated exactly like a normal version with one exception. Any enemy is hit by two blasts rather than one (ie, a pistol causes two S4 hits rather than one for each successful hit). However, each barrel takes a full turn to reload ❓ (although if you reload only one barrel you can fire it like a normal pistol/rifle). If you own a brace of double-barreled pistols you may fire them every other round (rather than every round like a normal brace).

items.name: Ostlander Double-barrelled Pistol
items.rules: A double-barrelled gun (of any sort) is treated exactly like a normal version with one exception. Any enemy is hit by two blasts rather than one (ie, a pistol causes two S4 hits rather than one for each successful hit). However, each barrel takes a full turn to reload ❓ (although if you reload only one barrel you can fire it like a normal pistol/rifle). If you own a brace of double-barreled pistols you may fire them every other round (rather than every round like a normal brace).

items.name: Pistol
items.rules: Can only fire every other turn unless using a brace. Wounded targets suffer a -2 armour save modifier. Can be used in melee for +1 Attack; brace grants 2 Attacks first round.

items.name: Repeater Handgun
items.rules: Wounded targets suffer -2 to their armour save. Cannot move and shoot in the same turn. May fire up to 3 shots; -1 to hit on additional shots. Always uses optional Blackpowder Weapons rules. Must do nothing for one full turn to reload. ❓

items.name: Repeater Pistol
items.rules: Wounded targets suffer -2 to their armour save. May fire up to 3 shots; -1 to hit on additional shots. Always uses optional Blackpowder Weapons rules. Can always fire one shot; needs 1 turn to reload ❓ for multi-shot. Only usable in first round of combat; too delicate to use as a club.

items.name: Swivel Gun
items.rules: May only fire every other turn due to reloading. Cannot move and fire in the same turn, except pivot or stand up. A Pirate Warband may have only one Swivel Gun at a time. User suffers -1 M and -1 I; cannot move and fire, or fire twice. Always uses optional Blackpowder Weapons rules. Ammo must be bought for each game and declared before firing.

items.name: Warplock pistol
items.rules: Can only fire every other turn unless using a brace. Wounded targets suffer a -2 armour save modifier. Can be used in close combat.

items.name: Belaying Pins
items.rules: Thrown after moving causes -1 to hit, no range penalties. Strikes at user Strength -1 and grants +1 save.

items.name: Blowpipe
items.rules: Auto-wound on 6 to hit, can't crit, improves enemy saves. Can fire while hidden; target may spot on Initiative test.

items.name: Bolas
items.rules: Natural 1 to hit causes S3 hit to wielder. Target can't move, -2 WS; can recover on 4+ during Recovery phase.

items.name: Bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Cathayan Candles
items.rules: No penalty for range or moving when throwing. Roll of 1 to hit explodes in thrower's hand; roll to wound against thrower. On 5+ after hit, target catches fire and suffers S4 damage each turn until extinguished on 4+.

items.name: Crossbow
items.rules: Cannot move and fire in the same turn.

items.name: Crossbow pistol
items.rules: Can shoot once before any blows are struck in the first round of combat. Allows use in hand-to-hand combat for a bonus attack.

items.name: Elf Bow
items.rules: Has a -1 save modifier.

items.name: Firepots Miragliano
items.rules: Thrown after moving causes -1 to hit, no range penalties. If an I test is failed when hit, the target cannot charge or shoot.

items.name: Fish-Hook Shot
items.rules: Ignores penalties for range or moving. Can target enemies in close combat; cannot be used when engaged. Can knock down enemies instead of causing damage with a Strength test.

items.name: Harpoon Crossbow
items.rules: May not move and fire in the same turn. Requires a full turn to prepare before shooting.

items.name: Javelins
items.rules: No penalty for range or moving when throwing.

items.name: Long bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Nehekharan Javelins
items.rules: These javelins receive +1 to hit when thrown.

items.name: Repeater Crossbow
items.rules: May fire twice per turn at -1 to hit.

items.name: Short Bow
items.rules: None.

items.name: Sling
items.rules: May fire twice if stationary but cannot exceed 9" range.

items.name: Sun Gauntlet
items.rules: No -1 modifier to hit at long range. Wounded models receive no armour save. May be used in close combat for an extra attack at Strength 4 with no save.

items.name: Sunstaff
items.rules: No -1 modifier to hit at long range. Wounded models receive no armour save.

items.name: Sunstaff (Lustria)
items.rules: 12" Strength 4 beam ignores armour and long-range penalties.

items.name: Throwing Knives/Stars
items.rules: No penalties for moving or range; not usable in close combat.

items.name: Tufenk
items.rules: On 4+, target is set on fire and takes S4 hit until extinguished. Can only fire every other turn.

items.name: Throwing Knife
items.rules: Thrown weapon.

items.name: Throwing Star
items.rules: Thrown weapon. Can throw 2 per turn.

items.name: Barding
items.rules: -1 Movement. A barded warhorse is only killed on a serious injury roll of ‘1'.

items.name: Bretonnian Barding
items.rules: A barded warhorse is only killed on a serious injury roll of ‘1'.

items.name: Buckler
items.rules: Can parry the first blow in each round of hand-to-hand combat.

items.name: Chaos Armour
items.rules: Gain +1 to Rarity roll per model taken out of action last battle. Cost reduced by 1 gc per Experience point the Hero has. Cannot be given to another; fuses to the wearer. Does not hinder spellcasting, but cannot be combined with shield/buckler. No penalty when worn with a shield.

items.name: Cooking Pot Helmet
items.rules: Unmodified 5+ save against being stunned, knocked down if successful.

items.name: Gromril Armour
items.rules: No penalty when worn with a shield.

items.name: Heavy Armour
items.rules: -1 Movement when worn with a shield.

items.name: Helmet
items.rules: 4+ save against being stunned, treat as knocked down if successful.

items.name: Ithilmar Armour
items.rules: Does not slow the wearer when used with a shield.

items.name: Kite Shield
items.rules: 5+ on foot, 6+ mounted, or +2/+1 with existing armour.

items.name: Lamellar Armour
items.rules: -1 Movement when combined with shield.

items.name: Light Armour
items.rules: No penalty when worn with a shield.

items.name: Masterwork Heavy Armour
items.rules: -1 Movement

items.name: Mechanical Suit
items.rules: Gain +1 to Rarity roll per model taken out of action last battle. Cost reduced by 1 gc per Experience point the Hero has. Cannot be given to another; fuses to the wearer. Does not hinder spellcasting, but cannot be combined with shield/buckler. +3 Movement. No penalty when worn with a shield.

items.name: Pavise
items.rules: counts as in cover; +1 save in close combat if charged to front. Shields combine with armour to give +1 to the save. Moves at half pace.

items.name: Shield
items.rules: Shields combine with armour to give +1 to the save. There is no movement penalty.

items.name: Toughened Leathers
items.rules: Cannot be combined with any other armour except a helmet or buckler. Cannot be sold back at the Trading Posts. Cannot cast spells like other armour

items.name: Amulet of the Moon
items.rules: Missile attacks against the wearer suffer -1 to hit; wearer gains a 5+ special save against missile fire.

items.name: Asp Arrows
items.rules: These arrows grant a +1 to hit bonus.

items.name: Banner
items.rules: Allows re-rolls of failed 'All Alone' tests for friendly warriors within 12"

items.name: Bear-Claw Necklace
items.rules: Grants the wearer Frenzy

items.name: Black Lotus
items.rules: 6 to hit causes automatic wound, 6 to wound causes critical hit

items.name: Blessed Stag Hide
items.rules: Allows re-roll of a failed Initiative test once per turn

items.name: Blessed Water
items.rules: Causes 1 wound on Undead, Daemon or Possessed models automatically with no armour save

items.name: Book of the Dead
items.rules: Allows Vampires to learn Necromantic magic and Necromancers to gain a new spell

items.name: Bota Bag
items.rules: Allows carrying one more water unit than normal

items.name: Bugman's Ale
items.rules: Makes warband immune to fear for one battle

items.name: Caltrops
items.rules: Reduces charge range by D6 inches when used

items.name: Cathayan Silk Clothes
items.rules: Allows re-roll of first failed Rout test, but may be ruined if leader is taken out of action

items.name: Chest
items.rules: Must be carried by two models who cannot use ranged weapons or attack in combat

items.name: Clan Pestilens Banner
items.rules: Models within 12" of the bearer may reroll one failed All Alone test per turn. Staff counts as a two-handed weapon. Only one may be taken.

items.name: Compass
items.rules: Allows one re-roll for deployment roll if user is present. Only one re-roll allowed per side.

items.name: Conch Shell Horn
items.rules: May re-roll roll-off for deployment and first turn. One re-roll total; multiple horns don't stack.

items.name: Crimson Shade
items.rules: +D3 Initiative, +1 Movement and Strength for one game 2-3: addicted, 12: permanent +1 Initiative

items.name: Dark Venom
items.rules: Weapon attacks gain +1 Strength

items.name: Elven Boots
items.rules: Wearer gains +1 Movement, even above the normal maximum.

items.name: Elven Cloak
items.rules: Enemies suffer -1 to hit with missile weapons against the wearer.

items.name: Elven Runestones
items.rules: Allows a dispel attempt against a spell by rolling against the spell's Difficulty (no Sorcery bonus).

items.name: Elven Wine
items.rules: One use only. Warband is immune to fear for the battle.

items.name: Enchanted Skins
items.rules: Grants a 6+ special save. Wearer is unaffected by enemy magic on a 5+.

items.name: Engine of Chaos
items.rules: Follows Wagon rules with exceptions Powered by a daemon which pulls the wagon Chaos Dwarf driver required, max 6 captives Driver can use lash, special out of control effects Captives can be acquired through various means Sacrificing captives grants rewards

items.name: Familiar
items.rules: Only spellcasters may attempt to acquire. Grants one spellcasting re-roll per turn. Familiars must remain in base contact and have no game presence.

items.name: Fire Arrows
items.rules: On a hit, roll a 4+ to set target on fire; affected warriors take S4 hit each turn until extinguished. One use only.

items.name: Fire Bomb
items.rules: Throws like Blessed Water. Target takes D3 S4 hits (no armour saves). Others within 1" take S3 hit. On '1' to hit, thrower is hit instead.

items.name: Firecrackers
items.rules: Interrupt animal/mounted charges with Initiative test; failed Ld test prevents charge. Can be thrown to panic animals. One use only.

items.name: Flash Powder
items.rules: Interrupt charge with Initiative test; failure blinds target and charge fails. One use only.

items.name: Fog-enhancing Warpstone Shards
items.rules: Missile attacks against bearer suffer -1 to hit penalty.

items.name: Forest Cloak
items.rules: Missile attacks against wearer suffer -1 to hit if near foliage. Magical attacks require 4+ to target unless caster is within Initiative range.

items.name: Garlic
items.rules: Vampires must pass a Leadership test to charge a model carrying garlic. One use only.

items.name: Halfling Cookbook
items.rules: Increases max number of warriors in warband by +1. Not usable by Undead or Carnival of Chaos.

items.name: Hammer of Witches
items.rules: User hates all Possessed, Skaven, Beastmen, Chaos, Daemons, Dark Elf, Orc & Goblins, and Sigmarite Sisters.

items.name: Hardtack Biscuits
items.rules: Eat at start of turn to gain +1 Toughness for one round. On a 1, miss next game. One use only.

items.name: Healing Herbs
items.rules: Restores all lost wounds when used in recovery phase

items.name: Holy (Unholy) Relic
items.rules: Automatically pass first Leadership test in battle. If on leader, applies to first Rout test instead.

items.name: Holy Tome
items.rules: Add +1 to prayer casting rolls.

items.name: Hook Hand
items.rules: Counts as a close combat weapon, cannot use two-handed weapons, may ignore Hand or Arm Injury on 4+.

items.name: Hunting Arrows
items.rules: Add +1 to all Injury rolls when using these arrows.

items.name: Iron Shod Boots
items.rules: May make an extra kick attack each turn at -1 to hit.

items.name: Jolly Roger
items.rules: Pirates within 12" do not count as being all alone. Takes up one hand. One per warband.

items.name: Small Ladder
items.rules: Carried and deployed by models to scale terrain. Special movement rules apply.

items.name: Large Ladder
items.rules: Carried and deployed by models to scale terrain. Special movement rules apply.

items.name: Lamp of the Djinn
items.rules: Grants three wishes with light and dark effects

items.name: Lantern
items.rules: Adds +4" to spotting hidden enemies.

items.name: Liber Bubonicus
items.rules: Allows a Pestilens Sorcerer or Plague Priest to permanently learn a spell from the Horned Rat list.

items.name: Liturgicus Infecticus
items.rules: +1 Leadership bonus when chanting

items.name: Lock Picks
items.rules: Open doors using Initiative instead of Strength

items.name: Lookout-Gnoblar
items.rules: An Ogre with a Lookout-Gnoblar gains the skill Dodge from the Speed skill list.

items.name: Luck-Gnoblar
items.rules: An Ogre with a Luck-Gnoblar may re-roll one dice during the battle. Remember you may never re-roll a re-roll.

items.name: Lucky Charm
items.rules: 4+ to discard first hit in battle

items.name: Mad Cap Mushrooms
items.rules: Grants frenzy for one battle 1: becomes permanently stupid

items.name: Magic Carpet
items.rules: Flying mount with 16" movement

items.name: Magic Gourd
items.rules: Provides 1D3 water units, may shatter

items.name: Magic Gubbinz
items.rules: 4+ to re-roll failed magic test

items.name: Mandrake Root
items.rules: +1 Toughness, stunned becomes knocked down 2-3: lose 1 Toughness permanently

items.name: Manticore Spoor
items.rules: Wounded models test each turn: 1 loses wound, 6 effect ends

items.name: Map of Cathay
items.rules: Random effects based on D6 roll

items.name: Monkey's Paw
items.rules: Grants three wishes with potential dark consequences

items.name: Mordheim Map
items.rules: Various effects based on D6 roll when purchased

items.name: Nehekharan Map
items.rules: Same rules as Mordheim map

items.name: Net
items.rules: Can be thrown once per game to immobilize target

items.name: Nomad Robes
items.rules: Reduces weather condition penalties

items.name: Opulent Coach
items.rules: Grants +3 to locate rare items EXPANDED RULES Border Town Burning Since the opulent coach was written long before the rules for wagons, we suggest that it is treated as a wagon with two draft horses, where the additional 70 gold crowns (100 gc wagon + 2 x 40 gc horses = 180 gold crowns total) spent, grants the +3 bonus for finding rare items. With respect to the previous rules whereby an opulent coach must not be placed on the table, we suggest the following. The warband may choose either to leave the opulent coach at their camp or to use the coach in battles. The warband may always use the coach when visiting the merchants after the battle. Note that a merchant caravan may not buy an opulent coach to replace a destroyed trade wagon with. They must have the trade wagon to transport goods and offer their specialist services. They can always buy a stage coach, wagon or opulent coach in addition to the trade wagon. That would be sure to impress!

items.name: Parrot
items.rules: Enemies in base contact suffer -1 to hit unless they pass Leadership Test

items.name: Peg Leg
items.rules: Reduces Movement by 1 but provides 6+ save against leg hits

items.name: Poisoned Weapon
items.rules: Applies to one weapon, cannot be traded; adds +1 to injury rolls.

items.name: Powder Keg
items.rules: Explodes on 4+ when hit and wounded by fire-related attacks; causes Strength 6 hit in D6+3” radius.

items.name: Rabbit's Foot
items.rules: Allows one dice reroll per battle or during exploration.

items.name: Rain Coat
items.rules: Available to Henchmen despite normal rules.

items.name: Red Toof Tribal Jewellery
items.rules: Cannot be removed, subject to Frenzy rules

items.name: Reptile Venom
items.rules: +1 Strength to missile weapons for one battle

items.name: Rickshaw
items.rules: One non-animal warband member must be assigned as the runner in order to move the rickshaw. He cannot charge or run whilst pulling the cart. As long as he pulls the rickshaw it remains in base contact with the runner and both are moved together. The runner may stop pulling the rickshaw at any time and move normally the same turn (including declaring charges). There is one seat in the rickshaw for one passenger to sit down. Boarding and deboarding the cart works the same way as mounting and dismounting. Models shooting at a rickshaw get a +1 on their ‘to hit' rolls. For each hit, roll on the table below to determine which part of the rickshaw and crew is hit. Then apply ‘to wound' rolls accordingly. D6 Result 1-2 Runner 3-4 Rickshaw (Toughness 8, Wounds 2) 5 Wheel (Toughness 6, Wounds 1) 6 Passenger In hand-to-hand combat attackers may choose whether they want to attack the runner, a wheel, the rickshaw itself or the passenger as long as they are in base contact with the respective part. The passenger is hit on 6+ only. Note that as soon as one of the wheels is destroyed (i.e. loses its last wound) the rickshaw can be pulled no more. Unless the rickshaw is destroyed completely it can be repaired after the battle.

items.name: Rope & Hook
items.rules: May re-roll failed Initiative tests when climbing

items.name: Rosary
items.rules: May re-roll failed Difficulty test if only moved or remained stationary

items.name: Rowboat
items.rules: For all the rules on how to use Rowboats, Riverboats, and Barges in your campaign, see the Vehicles of the Empire section.

items.name: Riverboat
items.rules: For all the rules on how to use Rowboats, Riverboats, and Barges in your campaign, see the Vehicles of the Empire section.

items.name: River Barge
items.rules: For all the rules on how to use Rowboats, Riverboats, and Barges in your campaign, see the Vehicles of the Empire section.

items.name: Scorpion Ring
items.rules: Can summon Tomb Scorpion for one battle with Leadership test

items.name: Scroll of the Rat Familiar
items.rules: Pestilens Sorcerer can transform Giant Rat into Rat Familiar Profile M WS BS S T W I A Ld 6 2 0 3 3 1 4 1 4 Rat Familiar earns XP as henchman, Lad's Got Talent improves spellcasting by +1

items.name: Sea Dragon Cloak
items.rules: Grants 5+ armour save in close combat, 4+ against missiles.

items.name: Skeleton Chariot
items.rules: Mount/dismount like ridden steeds 8" move, no running, double move when charging Suffers D3 S4 hits normally, 2D3 S6 hits when charging Half movement if one steed dies, immobile if both die Special charge rules, impact hits, initiative test to dodge Large target (+1 to hit), D6 determines hit location

items.name: Smoke Bomb
items.rules: Creates a 2" smoke cloud that blocks attacks and line of sight until next turn. Special interactions apply when used in melee or if carrier is taken down.

items.name: Snake Charmer's flute
items.rules: Can immobilize serpents within 6" if the bearer skips an entire turn to play.

items.name: Spider Spittle
items.rules: Toughness test or become paralyzed until recovery

items.name: Spy Glass
items.rules: 4+ to detect one Hidden enemy model, cannot run or charge that turn

items.name: Squig Prodder
items.rules: Extends Squig control range to 12", functions as spear in combat

items.name: Standard of Nagarythe
items.rules: Acts as second rallying point, re-roll failed Leadership tests within 12"

items.name: Superior Blackpowder
items.rules: +1 Strength to all blackpowder weapons for one game

items.name: Sword-Gnoblar
items.rules: An Ogre with a Sword-Gnoblar gains one extra Strength 2 attack in Close Combat, at the weapon skill of the owning model. This attack is made at the same time as the owning Hero's attacks and must be directed at a model the Ogre has directed attacks toward. The opponent's attention is on the Ogre!

items.name: Tarot Cards
items.rules: Leadership test to modify Exploration dice by -1/+1, or miss next game if failed by 3+

items.name: Tears of Shallaya
items.rules: Immune to all poisons for one battle

items.name: Telescope
items.rules: Increase missile weapon range by D6 inches, triple hidden enemy spotting distance

items.name: Tome of Magic
items.rules: Wizard gains extra spell from own list or Lesser Magic list

items.name: Torch
items.rules: Acts as lantern (+4" hidden spotting), causes Fear in animals, can be used as club (-1 to hit), prevents Regeneration, lasts one game

items.name: Trade Wagon
items.rules: Follows all rules for Wagons; includes two draft horses; needs a driver. Stores equipment and treasures; destroyed wagon causes loss of all stored items. For every five different rare items stored, the Merchant gets +1 to rare item rolls. If abandoned, the wagon may be captured by the enemy; this affects rare item rolls.

items.name: Treasure Map
items.rules: Roll D6 after game for special treasure effects

items.name: Trip Wire
items.rules: A Hero may spend a turn to place a trap marker; models within 2" may trigger it and suffer a S4 hit or be knocked down or stunned.

items.name: Venom Ring
items.rules: The Venom Ring renders the wearer immune to the effects of all poisons.

items.name: Vial of Pestilens
items.rules: One-use: Toughness test or Out of Action, saves Skaven if successful

items.name: Victuals
items.rules: Victuals may be used after a battle. If the warband sells Treasures, the warband is considered to be one size lower (so a warband with 10-12 members is considered to be comprised of 7-9 members instead). A warband may use as many victuals as they wish, but note that the warband size cannot be considered lower than 1-3 models.

items.name: Vodka
items.rules: One-use item granting +1 Leadership (max 10) to warband, but requires Toughness test or suffer -1 Initiative

items.name: Wagon, Stagecoach
items.rules: For all the rules on how to use Rowboats, Riverboats, and Barges in your campaign, see the Vehicles of the Empire section.

items.name: War Horn
items.rules: Once per battle, +1 Leadership for one turn

items.name: War Horn of Nagarythe
items.rules: Same as normal War Horn

items.name: Warpstone Amulet
items.rules: Reroll one die during battle or wyrdstone exploration

items.name: Wheelbarrow
items.rules: Transports cumbersome items, pushed by models

items.name: Winter Furs
items.rules: Immune to Deep Snow and Chilling Cold, becomes useless if soaked

items.name: Wolfcloak
items.rules: Requires Strength test to acquire, +1 armour save vs shooting

items.name: Wyrdstone Pendulum
items.rules: Leadership test to reroll one exploration die
